data.title: Ademi Firm investigating Dynavax Technologies Corp. (Nasdaq: DVAX) for fair price in deal with Sanofi. #Investigation #ShareholderAlert
data.description: In Milwaukee on December 24, 2025, it was reported that The Ademi Firm has initiated an investigation into Dynavax (Nasdaq: DVAX) regarding potential breaches of fiduciary duty and legal violations in connection with the company's recent deal with Sanofi. Investors are encouraged to participate in the investigation to gather more information and be a part of the inquiry.

data.title: Halper Sadeh LLC urges Shoals Technologies Group Inc. shareholders to discuss their rights with the firm, as there may be limited time.
data.description: Investors are advised to promptly reach out to Halper Sadeh LLC as time may be running out to protect their interests. In a press release dated December 24, 2025, the New York-based law firm specializing in investor rights disclosed their investigation into potential misconduct by specific executives and board members at Shoals Technologies Group Inc. listed on NASDAQ.

data.title: BOXABL Inc. secures license as "Commercial Modular Manufacturer" in California, a milestone for expansion.LAS VEGAS, Dec. 24, 2025.
data.description: In Las Vegas on December 24, 2025, BOXABL Inc., a prominent provider of factory-built modular solutions, revealed that it has received a vital license from California, designating it as a "Commercial Modular Manufacturer." This milestone signifies a significant advancement for the company as it continues to expand its operations.

data.title: WORK Medical Technology Group LTD is doing a 1-for-100 reverse stock split on Dec. 29, 2025, trading as "WOK" on Nasdaq.
data.description: Hangzhou, China - December 24, 2025 - Today, WORK Medical Technology Group LTD (Nasdaq: WOK), a leading medical device supplier in China, revealed plans for a reverse stock split of its ordinary shares at a rate of 1-for-100. This move by the Company, operating through its subsidiary Work (Hangzhou) Medical Treatment Equipment Co., Ltd., and its Chinese subsidiaries, is set to take effect on December 29, 2025. Following the split, the Company's Class A ordinary shares will continue to be listed on the Nasdaq Capital Market under the symbol “WOK” but will trade with a new CUSIP number: G9767H125.

data.title: Ripple processed $95B in payments, yet XRP price didn't rise in 2025. More banks on RippleNet, 4B XRP Ledger transactions, 300+ banking partners didn't lift XRP. Rise benefited Ripple Labs, not XRP holders.
data.description: Ripple (CRYPTO: XRP) has facilitated $95 billion worth of payments overall. However, in 2025, it was noted that XRP's price and adoption rates did not always progress hand in hand. The emphasis on infrastructure had diminished during this time, as the previous belief was that more adoption on RippleNet by banks would lead to increased transaction volume and subsequently higher XRP values. Despite boasting over 4 billion XRP Ledger transactions, approximately $95 billion in liquidity volume, and having more than 300 banking partners, XRP prices did not experience the anticipated surge. It was highlighted that infrastructure expansion alone is not adequate for token appreciation unless the token secures control and economic benefits. In 2025, Ripple Labs benefited more than XRP holders as they obtained approval for operating Ripple National. For further details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Investing $10 in Bitcoin in 2009 could've paid for mega presents this Christmas, starting at $0.0009 per unit.
data.description: The leading cryptocurrency Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) has been in existence for nearly 17 years. If an individual had invested in Bitcoin from the start, it would have been extremely valuable by this Christmas. In January 2009, Satoshi Nakamoto mined the genesis block containing the first 50 BTC. In October of the same year, a Finnish computer science student made one of the earliest BTC transactions by selling 5,050 BTC for $5.02, equating to a unit price of $0.0009. Back then, the options for trading Bitcoin were limited.

data.title: Seizures of oil tankers by Trump near Venezuela could set precedent for other countries, legal experts caution.
data.description: Legal experts are warning that the recent actions taken by the United States against ships near Venezuela could set a precedent that encourages other nations to also seize or detain ships. The move has sparked concern among experts who fear that this could lead to an increase in such incidents globally. The potential repercussions of these actions have raised alarm bells among legal analysts, with the number of ships affected and the countries involved being closely monitored for any further developments.

data.title: HALPER SADEH LLC advises VIRT shareholders to discuss rights; investigating officers. Contact ASAP. NY, Dec. 24, 2025.
data.description: Investors who own shares in Virtu Financial, Inc. (NYSE: VIRT) are advised to promptly get in touch with Halper Sadeh LLC, a legal firm specializing in protecting investor rights. The company is looking into potential misconduct by specific executives and board members of Virtu Financial, Inc. in a recent inquiry. To ensure that appropriate actions are taken within a limited timeframe, affected shareholders are urged to reach out to the firm without delay. The investigation started on Dec. 24, 2025, in New York.

data.title: Halper Sadeh LLC urges UNFI shareholders to discuss rights, contact firm for potential actions. Investigating NYSE: UNFI officers.
data.description: Investor rights law firm Halper Sadeh LLC is currently looking into the actions of specific officers and directors at United Natural Foods, Inc. (NYSE: UNFI). Shareholders are advised to reach out promptly as there may be a time constraint to exercise their rights. For further details, refer to the press release dated December 24, 2025, from New York.

data.title: 70% of Ether positions are bullish as whales have gathered over $2B in ETH, with record-high leverage. ETH price breakout ahead?
data.description: Whales have amassed more than $2 billion worth of Ether, while derivatives positioning shows a 70% skew towards being net long, with leverage reaching all-time highs. The question remains: when will the price of ETH experience a breakout?

data.title: Global Healthy Living Foundation is expanding access to education and clinical trial info for Spanish-speaking lupus communities with new centers reaching new patients.
data.description: New patients are being reached by the English and Spanish Language Lupus Help Centers operated by GHLF in Upper Nyack, New York. The centers have reported an increase in their outreach efforts to assist individuals living with lupus, with a significant rise in the number of patients seeking support. The enhanced services provided by the centers have proven to be effective in catering to the needs of both English and Spanish-speaking individuals affected by lupus in the area.

data.title: Bitcoin is down 7.5% since Christmas Eve 2024, following a pattern where it has seen average gains of 126% the following year in three prior instances, with Bitcoin fell between 51.4% to 70.8% on Christmas Eve in 2014, 2018, and 2022, and rallied from 40.9% to 159.8% the next year.
data.description: Since Christmas Eve 2024, Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) has experienced a 7.5% decline, potentially indicating a trend that has historically resulted in significant gains the following year. This pattern has occurred three times in the past 12 years: in 2014, 2018, and 2022. In each instance, Bitcoin recorded a year-over-year decrease on Christmas Eve, followed by impressive rallies the subsequent year. For example, in 2014, Bitcoin dropped by 51.4% to $323, but saw a 40.9% increase in 2015. In 2018, it crashed by 70.8% to $4,079, only to surge by 79.4% in 2019. Similarly, in 2022, Bitcoin declined by 66.9% to $16,822, and then experienced a significant 159.8% increase in 2023. On average, Bitcoin fell by 63% on these three Christmas Eves and then gained 126.4% the following year. The current trajectory of Bitcoin in 2025 appears to follow this established pattern.
